---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<nav class="top-nav">

  <!-- LEFT -->
  <div class="nav-left">
    <a class="logo" href="https://biblehub.com/john/14-6.htm" target="_blank">
      † John 14:6
    </a>
  </div>

  <!-- CENTER -->
  <div class="nav-center">
    <a class="active" href="index.html">
      <span class="nav-icon">▸</span>/Home/
    </a>

    <a href="about.html">
      <span class="nav-icon">○</span>About
    </a>

    <a href="work.html">
      <span class="nav-icon">▣</span>Papers
    </a>

    <a href="contacts.html">
      <span class="nav-icon">✉</span>Contacts
    </a>
  </div>

  <!-- RIGHT -->
  <div class="nav-right">
    <span class="nav-phrase">
      Epidemiology and Crop Protection
    </span>
  </div>

</nav>

<section class="hero">

  <div class="hero-text">
    <h1>
      Ricardo GTomaz<br>
      PhD Researcher
    </h1>

    <p>
      Applying Predictive Modeling &amp; Machine Learning
      to Plant Disease Risk Forecasting and Crop Protection.
    </p>

    <!-- SOCIAL ICONS -->
    <div class="social-icons">
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/ricardo-gomes-tom%C3%A1z-0137ba189/" target="_blank">
        <img src="assets/linkedin.png" alt="LinkedIn">
      </a>

      <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0001-7708-4263" target="_blank">
        <img src="assets/orcid.png" alt="ORCID">
      </a>

      <a href="https://github.com/tomazrg" target="_blank">
        <img src="assets/github.png" alt="GitHub">
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="hero-image">
    <img src="assets/profile.jpg" alt="Profile">
  </div>

</section>

```
